summary: Fixed slug-titlecase "Finra" to the correct brand capitalization "FINRA" in root.go's Short/Long and auth.go's Short text; fixed a mid-sentence truncated Short string in data_get.go.
reason: The generator's root/auth boilerplate title-cases the API name from the slug ("finra" -> "Finra") rather than using narrative.display_name for this specific prefix, which is wrong for any all-caps-acronym API. Separately, a spec-authored endpoint description was truncated by the generator's description-length helper with no closing punctuation.
validated_outcome: go build/vet clean; --help output reads correctly.
